description: Authoritative advance widths (design units, 1000 UPM) for the Hildegard Neumes OTF. Keyed by font-internal glyph name. The generate-rhena-glyphs.py script asserts the OTF matches these to within `tolerance` units; mismatch is a build error. 2026-04-14 width review corrected three overflow bugs: rh_virga 65→90, rh_liquescent_asc 140→160, rh_liquescent_desc 140→160 (docs/planning/width-review-2026-04-14.md). 2026-04-19 SMuFL alignment (docs/adr/ADR-0009-smufl-alignment.md) bumped two tradition-agnostic geometric glyph widths to match Bravura: rh_divisio_finalis 56→120, rh_virgula 12→91. 2026-04-19 paleographic correction: rh_virga 90→240 — direct manuscript comparison (virga vs. adjacent punctum on the same folio) confirms the virga head is the same breadth as a punctum (matches Bravura's convention of chantPunctum and chantPunctumVirga sharing an advance). Calligraphic atoms retain Rhineland-distinct widths per ADR-0008.
